question: The scatter plot shows daily screen time vs sleep. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Sleep clearly decreases as daily screen time increases.
options.B: There is no clear overall relationship between daily screen time and sleep.
options.C: Sleep clearly increases as daily screen time increases.
options.D: People with the most daily screen time clearly get the most sleep, as shown by the largest, darkest points on the right.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the x-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
